series_metadata.series_description: Advices are letters sent by a bank to its customer that document and explain adjustments that a bank makes to a customer''s account. The Accounting department maintains advices received on behalf of the State Regular Account. Such advices include, but are not limited to: bank charge slips, returns, confirmations of transactions, records of receipts and disbursements, and monthly account statements.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: current fiscal year. ; Electronic: current fiscal year
